name: Onboard New Developer
description: Prepare everything a new developer needs to be productive on day one: environment setup, codebase tour, first task, and mentorship plan

steps.name: Audit Onboarding Prerequisites
steps.description: Check that the repo has a working README, setup script, and .env.example. Verify that a new machine can run the app by following the existing docs. Note any gaps.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Setup docs verified, gaps in README or setup scripts identified and documented

steps.name: Write Day-One Setup Guide
steps.description: Create a step-by-step guide from zero to running: install dependencies, clone repo, configure environment, run tests, and start the app. Include expected output at each step.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Setup guide written that a new developer with the required skills can follow to a running app in under 30 minutes

steps.name: Codebase Tour Document
steps.description: Write a codebase tour: folder structure overview, key modules and their responsibilities, data flow diagram, naming conventions, and where to find things.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Codebase tour written covering structure, key modules, data flow, and conventions

steps.name: Prepare First Task
steps.description: Identify a well-scoped, non-critical first task: a good-first-issue or a small improvement. Write a detailed task description with context, acceptance criteria, and hints.
steps.acceptance_criteria: First task written with clear scope, context, acceptance criteria, and pointers to relevant code

steps.name: 30-60-90 Day Plan
steps.description: Write a 30/60/90 day ramp plan: what to learn, what to own, and what to contribute at each milestone. Include key people to meet and processes to understand.
steps.acceptance_criteria: 30-60-90 day plan written with concrete milestones, learning goals, and ownership targets at each stage
